news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses in Zynex to reach out to him directly to explore their potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Zynex within the period spanning from March 13, 2023, to March 11, 2025, and are interested in initiating a discussion about your situation, you are encouraged to make contact.
news.headline: Legal firm investigating investor claims against Zynex, urges those affected to contact for discussion between March 13, 2023 and March 11, 2025.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 17, 2025, an inventor from Salina, Kansas shared about his creation, the BUCKET BUDDY. The inventor, who is also a driver, aimed to address the need for easy access to multiple beverages during long haul drives. The innovative design allows users to conveniently sip their drinks while on the go. This solution proves beneficial for drivers looking to keep various beverages on hand during their travels.
news.headline: Inventor from Salina, Kan. creates BUCKET BUDDY to hold multiple beverages for drivers. Allows easy access during drives.

news.summary: Chicago-based Oxford Capital Group, LLC disclosed on April 17, 2025, its purchase of the Carefree Portfolio, which comprises eleven seniors housing properties encompassing 489 units. These properties are located in the Minneapolis area and northern Minnesota. An affiliate of Oxford Capital executed the acquisition.
news.headline: Oxford Capital Group acquires 11 Minnesota seniors housing properties with 489 units in Minneapolis, northern MN.
Trump ends comments to reporters at Italy's PM Meloni luncheon.
Trump: We'll have very little problem making deal with Europe.
Italy's PM Meloni on EU tariff deal: I'm here to help that.

Italy's PM Meloni: I am sure we will make a deal on tariffs.
Trump: NATO defense spending will go up.

news.summary: In Munich, Hawk, a top provider of AI-driven anti-money laundering (AML), screening, and fraud prevention tools, has been acknowledged as a Strong Performer by Forrester in the latest report titled “The Forrester Wave™: Anti-Money-Laundering Solutions, Q2 2025”. This recognition, in their debut report appearance, highlights their technology's excellence, the comprehensive nature of their solution, and the robustness of their strategic approach. Wolf, a spokesperson for Hawk, emphasized the significance of achieving the Strong Performer status in the industry assessment.
news.headline: Hawk named a Strong Performer in Forrester's AML Solutions report. Quality tech and strong strategy praised.
Trump: We will end up with substantial number for baseline.
Trump: We will make a good deal with China.
Trump: We will have a deal with China.
Trump: No rush to announce trade deals.
Trump: We're going to make fair deals.

news.summary: U.S. stocks saw a mixed day of trading with the Dow Jones falling over 450 points to 39,191.93 (down 1.20%), NASDAQ down 0.09% to 16,293.14, and S&P 500 gaining 0.30% to 5,291.42. Energy shares surged by 2.5% while information technology shares fell by 0.9%. D.R. Horton, Inc (NYSE: DHI) reported disappointing second-quarter results with sales falling 15% Y/Y to $7.73 billion and EPS at $2.58, missing the consensus. Net sales orders also fell by 15% Y/Y. The company revised its FY25 revenue guidance lower. In equities trading, Baijiayun Group Ltd (NASDAQ: RTC) shares surged 60% to $0.3447. Check Benzinga.com for the full story.
news.headline: Gold falls over 1%; D.R. Horton reports disappointing Q2 earnings with sales dropping 15% to $7.73B. Dow falls 450 points.
Trump on Italy: We're going to make a trade deal.
Trump: We're moving along on trade very well.
Trump: Everybody's on my priority list.

news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses in Fluence to reach out to him to explore potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Fluence within the period of October 28, 2021 to February 10, 2025 and wish to discuss this matter further, please don't hesitate to contact him.
news.headline: Investor alert: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for investors of Fluence Energy. Losses reported between Oct 28, 2021 - Feb 10, 2025. Contact James Wilson for options.
Trump: The US and Italy have a very good relationship.

news.summary: Claritev Corporation, a healthcare technology and data company listed on NYSE as CTEV, revealed the addition of key executives to their senior leadership team. Dr. Jigar S. Patel has been named Chief Medical Officer. This move aligns with Claritev's goal of enhancing affordability, transparency, and fairness in healthcare. The strategic appointments aim to drive growth, innovation, and bring clarity to the healthcare sector through new products and solutions.
news.headline: Claritev Corp appoints new leadership team members to support growth & mission in healthcare sector. #CTEV $CTEV.

news.summary: Ford Motor Company and Ford Motor Credit Company are set to announce their financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Monday, May 5th at 4:05 p.m. ET. Following this, a conference call will be hosted at 5:00 p.m. ET by Jim Farley, the president and CEO, alongside Sherry House, the CFO, and other members of the senior management team. The call will cover the company's performance, with a focus on the Ford+ plan for growth and value creation.
news.headline: Ford will announce Q1 2025 financial results on May 5th at 4:05 p.m. ET, followed by a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.

news.summary: In a recent annual meeting of shareholders, PPG (NYSE:PPG) CEO Tim Knavish presented the company's 2024 performance. PPG reported net sales of $15.8 billion for the year, with adjusted EPS rising by 6%. This growth was attributed to the success of PPG's technology-driven products and robust brand sales. The company achieved record-breaking results in multiple sectors throughout 2024.
news.headline: PPG's CEO shares strong 2024 performance at shareholders' meeting, with $15.8B in net sales and 6% EPS growth.

news.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc.'s supplemental Biologics License Application for Eylea HD Injection 8 mg has been accepted for Priority Review by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This application seeks approval for Eylea HD to treat macular edema after retinal vein occlusion and to expand the dosing schedule to include monthly dosing. The FDA has set a target action date of August 19, 2025, with the use of a Priority Review voucher. The Phase 3 QUASAR trial's data regarding Eylea HD's clinical program will be included in the review process. Other related information can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: FDA accepts Regeneron's sBLA for Eylea HD for macular edema & dosing expansion, target date Aug 19, 2025. (Character count: 97)

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Pernod Ricard USA has confirmed the extension of their partnership with AEG, ensuring exclusive sponsorship in essential premium spirits segments throughout AEG's range of properties.
news.headline: Pernod Ricard USA and AEG extend partnership with exclusive rights in premium spirits, multi-asset deal.

news.summary: HYPE & SOL are leading the way in Layer 1 cryptocurrencies as BTC experiences a dive following Powell's tariff comments, before rebounding. BTC dominance is at its highest in 4 years, with a new ATH in hashrate while supply on exchanges hits record lows. ETH's 24-hour revenue drops below $100k, and the BTC/ETH ratio has increased by about 100% over the past year. SOL hits its highest revenue since February. Powell is positive about the future of crypto in the US, and Gensler believes BTC will have longevity. Countries are printing unlimited money to buy BTC according to CZ. Russia is considering creating a stablecoin. A court has paused an 18-state lawsuit against the SEC, and VanEck plans to launch a "crypto-related ETF." The news is regularly covered on the FOMO HOUR podcast, hosted by Farokh, Mando, and Tyler, featuring updates from the crypto and macro sectors. The podcast streams live Monday to Friday on YouTube and X.
news.headline: HYPE & SOL top L1s, Powell alarms Markets, Base launches meme coin. BTC dives and rebounds, dominance at 4-year high. ETH revenue drops below $100k. BTC/ETH ratio surges ~100%. SOL hits highest REV since Feb. Powell optimistic on US crypto path. Gensler believes BTC longevity. Russia considers stablecoin creation. VanEck to launch 'crypto-related ETF'. Live updates daily on FOMO HOUR. Join: yeet.com/register?aff=fomohour Playlist: youtube.com/playlist?list=PLGSgoImPFTiVpkHhLXF78cE_Z3uG7VNGL Podcast: podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/fomohour. Stay updated with the latest news in the crypto world! #bitcoin #crypto #podcast
Trump: very confident on trade deal with European Union

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in e.l.f. Beauty to reach out to him for a consultation on their potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in e.l.f. Beauty during the period from November 1, 2023, to November 19, 2024, and suffered losses, Wilson is available for direct contact to discuss your situation further.
news.headline: Investor alert: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for e.l.f. Beauty investors. Contact to discuss losses between Nov 1, 2023 and Nov 19, 2024.

news.summary: A popular sandwich chain, Capriotti's Sandwich Shop, recognized for its delicious cheesesteaks and turkey subs, is expanding its presence in the Youngstown area. The chain will be holding a grand opening on April 29th in Niles, Ohio. Capriotti's is known for its hand-crafted sandwiches and has garnered acclaim for its offerings. The opening of the new location signifies the brand's commitment to growth and serving more customers in the community.
news.headline: Capriotti's Sandwich Shop franchisee of the year opens new location in Niles, Ohio on April 29th, expanding the chain's reach.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 17, 2025, an inventor from Columbus, Ohio, shared plans for GY Lighters, a new invention aimed at helping smokers keep track of their lighters. The inventor explained that the idea originated from a desire to address the issue of losing lighters. The innovative design of GY Lighters includes an alert system that notifies the user if they have left the lighter behind. This feature is intended to provide a solution to the common problem of misplacing lighters.
news.headline: Inventor from Columbus creates G Y LIGHTERS to prevent loss with alert system. (CLM-719)

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, it was announced that the North Riyadh Geopark and Salma Geopark in Saudi Arabia have been recognized by UNESCO as members of the Global Geoparks Network. This recognition signifies a crucial step for Saudi Arabia in conserving geoheritage and advancing sustainable development. The designation highlights the importance of these geoparks in the region and demonstrates Saudi Arabia's commitment to safeguarding natural sites. This move positions the two geoparks to benefit from international cooperation and support for their conservation efforts.
news.headline: North Riyadh Geopark and Salma Geopark from Saudi Arabia joined UNESCO's Global Geoparks Network, enhancing geoheritage preservation.

news.summary: A Software-as-a-Service provider, KDAN (TPEx: 7737), based in Irvine, California, revealed a significant enhancement to their primary PDF Software Development Kit (SDK), ComPDF, on April 17, 2025. The update integrates advanced AI features, catering to enterprise-level document management needs.
news.headline: KDAN (TPEx: 7737) upgrades PDF SDK technology, partners with distributors to expand; adds AI to ComPDF for document mgmt.

news.summary: Shares of UnitedHealth Group Inc. (NYSE: UNH) plummeted over 21% on Thursday, marking the stock's biggest decline since 1998. The drop came as the company announced disappointing quarterly results attributed in part to the escalating healthcare costs in the U.S. CEO Andrew Witty elaborated on the earnings call. Notably, UnitedHealth revised its fiscal 2025 earnings outlook, now anticipating adjusted earnings to fall within $26 to $26.50 per share compared to the previous $29.50 to $30 per share. This adjustment was influenced by increased care activity within UnitedHealthcare's Medicare Advantage sector, leading to higher utilization rates of physician and outpatient services. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: UnitedHealth Group CEO warns high US healthcare costs unsustainable, stock down 21%, lowers earnings guidance to $26-26.50 per share from earlier $29.50-30.

news.summary: In RENO, Nev., on April 17, 2025, CIQ unveiled a user-friendly management interface for the Warewulf cluster provisioning system. The new Management UI aims to simplify cluster administration, while an API has been developed to enable automation and integration at scale. This tech preview release highlights CIQ's commitment to enhancing user experience in cluster management. These advancements are crucial for organizations looking to efficiently handle the management of clusters. Such innovations are key in streamlining processes and facilitating scalability in cluster operations.
news.headline: CIQ unveils tech preview of new Warewulf Management UI and Open Source API to streamline HPC cluster management.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Philadelphia, Impilo, a prominent company facilitating at-home healthcare via connected devices and diagnostics, revealed its collaboration with the Elation Partner Hub. This venture seeks to merge Impilo's platform with Elation Health's top services.
news.headline: Impilo partners with Elation for at-home healthcare delivery, integrating platform with Elation Health's hub.

news.summary: Announcing new AI advancements and platform features aimed at boosting customer insight, improving team uptake, and refining digital performance. Quantum Metric, a leading customer-focused digital analytics platform, unveiled these innovations in COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo., on April 17, 2025.
news.headline: Quantum Metric launches Spring 2025 product with AI innovations to enhance customer understanding and digital optimization.

news.summary: In the latest data released, it was noted that there was an increase in home values along with a decrease in effective tax rates. The average property tax bill for a single-family home saw a 3% rise to $4,172. The Northeast and Midwest regions continue to have the highest tax rates. This information was shared by ATTOM, a renowned organization specializing in land, property data, and real estate. This update is from Irvine, California, on April 17, 2025.
news.headline: Average property tax on single-family homes in the US rose by 2.7% in 2024 to $4,172. Highest rates in Northeast and Midwest.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Las Vegas, a significant change is looming in the gaming sector. Historically, game development has been a risky endeavor - time-consuming, expensive, and marked by significant uncertainty, leading to more failures than successes. However, Sierra Artificial Neural Networks, LLC (Sierra...
news.headline: AI transforming game development; Sierra ANN leading change. Gaming industry evolving rapidly. Exciting times ahead!

news.summary: Westover presents luxurious single-family residences within a highly desired area in Forsyth County.
news.headline: Luxury home community Westover in Cumming, Georgia is now open for sale, offering elegant single-family homes in Forsyth County.
Freddie Mac: US 30-Yr fixed rate mortgages 6.83% April 17th week vs 6.62% prior week.

news.summary: In Easton, Maryland, on April 17, 2025, Shore Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: SHBI) revealed the selection of Charles Cullum as the new Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of both the Company and the Bank. His tenure begins on April 21, 2025. Charles Cullum's appointment follows the departure of Todd L. Capitani, who had informed the company earlier...
news.headline: Shore Bancshares, Inc. appoints Charles Cullum as EVP & CFO, succeeding Todd L. Capitani. Effective April 21, 2025.

news.summary: James Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in TFI to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained securities in TFI within the period from April 26, 2024, to February 19, 2025, and wish to explore your options, Wilson encourages you to contact him directly.
news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for investors of TFI International from April 26, 2024 to Feb 19, 2025. Contact for more info.

news.summary: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, Va., reported today that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averaged 6.83% according to its Primary Mortgage Market Survey. This rate, although slightly higher, has stayed below the 7% mark for thirteen straight weeks. Sam Khater, Freddie Mac's Chief Economist, commented on the data, noting that a year ago, rates had reached 7.1% with purchase application demand 13% lower than the current levels. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Freddie Mac reports that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage now averages 6.83%, below 7% for the 13th consecutive week.

news.summary: In Calabasas, California, Institutional Property Advisors of Marcus & Millichap has appointed a new National Director of Multifamily, Andrew Leahy. The hiring aims to enhance the company's operations in the multifamily sector. The specific amount that will be invested in this strategic addition has not been disclosed.
news.headline: Marcus & Millichap’s Institutional Property Advisors in Calabasas, Calif. hires new National Director of Multifamily.

US mortgage rates surge by most in a year as tariffs hit market.

news.summary: Officials have decided to decrease interest rates by 0.25%, noting a decline in the region's growth prospects due to escalating trade tensions.
news.headline: Central bank cuts rates by 0.25% amid trade tension uncertainty caused by Trump's tariffs; Region's growth outlook worsens.
